bead.title: repo-structure: extract model/provider listing helpers, refresh docs, and finish the root-facade audit
bead.description:
PROBLEM
Once execution and routing slices are extracted, the remaining root-package bulk is model/provider listing, catalog metadata, billing/compatibility helpers, and docs that still point at concrete root file paths. This final slice must finish the root-facade shrink without changing the public import path.

ROOT CAUSE WITH FILE:LINE
`docs/helix/02-design/adr/ADR-008-service-package-and-transcript-boundaries.md:43-64` defines root as the public facade and implementation as internal. `service.go:18-39` keeps `ListProviders`, `ListModels`, `ListPolicies`, and `HealthCheck` in the public service contract. `website/content/docs/embedding/_index.md:953-955` still names `public_api.go` and `public_cli_api.go`, while `website/content/docs/routing/_index.md:30-98` and `website/content/docs/observability/_index.md:59` still link to concrete root implementation paths.

PROPOSED FIX
Extract or reduce model/provider/catalog/billing helpers behind internal packages or thin root adapters; refresh website/docs/CONTRACT citations and changelog so they describe the post-extraction layout accurately. Finish the root-facade audit allowlist so remaining root `.go` files are deliberate public surface, not leftover implementation.

NON-SCOPE
Do not change CONTRACT-003 type names, method signatures, public import path, or public CLI command behavior. Do not rework unrelated internal APIs beyond what this extraction needs.
bead.acceptance:
1. The in-scope model/provider/billing helpers are extracted behind internal packages or reduced to thin root-facade adapters; `github.com/easel/fizeau` remains the public import path.
2. `website/content/docs/embedding/_index.md`, `website/content/docs/routing/_index.md`, `website/content/docs/observability/_index.md`, CONTRACT-003 path citations, and `CHANGELOG.md` describe the new locations accurately without renaming public types or methods.
3. `go test . -run 'TestListModels_.*|TestListProviders_.*|TestHealthCheck_.*|TestPublicServiceAPISmoke' -count=1` passes.
4. `go test ./agentcli ./cmd/fiz ./cmd/bench -run 'TestCLI_ExecuteUsesServiceContract|TestRouteStatusCommandJSON|TestListModelsCommandJSON|TestBenchCommandName' -count=1` passes.
5. The final root-facade audit from fizeau-0247682e is updated and passing, so the remaining root `.go` files match the deliberate public-facade allowlist rather than the pre-refactor implementation inventory.
6. `go test ./... -count=1` passes.
7. `lefthook run pre-commit` passes.
